---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
format: html
page-layout: full
---


```{=html}
<style>
  /* Fullscreen Hero Section */
  .hero {
    position: relative;
    width: 100vw;
    height: 100vh;
    background: url('/images/block-banner.gif') no-repeat center center / cover;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    text-align: center;
    color: white;
  }

  /* Overlay for readability */
  .hero-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
    z-index: 1;
  }

  /* Content inside hero */
  .hero-content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    max-width: 800px;
    padding: 2rem;
    color: white;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
  }

  .hero-content h1 {
    font-size: 3.5rem;
    animation: fadeIn 1.5s ease-in-out forwards;
    opacity: 0;
  }

  .hero-content h2 {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    margin-top: 1rem;
    animation: fadeIn 2.5s ease-in-out forwards;
    opacity: 0;
  }

  .hero-content .btn-container {
    margin-top: 2rem;
    animation: fadeIn 3s ease-in-out forwards;
    opacity: 0;
  }

  .hero-content .btn {
    padding: 0.8rem 1.5rem;
    margin: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    font-weight: bold;
    text-decoration: none;
    border-radius: 5px;
    color: white;
    background-color: #007bff;
    transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
  }

  .hero-content .btn:hover {
    background-color: #0056b3;
  }

  .hero-content .btn-secondary {
    background-color: #28a745;
  }

  .hero-content .btn-secondary:hover {
    background-color: #1e7e34;
  }

  /* Animation Keyframes */
  @keyframes fadeIn {
    0% {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    100% {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }
  }

  /* Responsive Design */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero-content h1 {
      font-size: 2.5rem;
    }
    .hero-content h2 {
      font-size: 1rem;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 576px) {
    .hero-content h1 {
      font-size: 2rem;
    }
    .hero-content h2 {
      font-size: 0.9rem;
    }
  }
</style>

<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-overlay"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <h1>Abdelkarim el Ghani</h1>
    <h2>Statistical Data Analyst | Neuroscientist | Pharmacology Enthusiast</h2>
    <div class="btn-container">
      <a href="projects.qmd" class="btn">Explore Projects</a>
      <a href="about.qmd" class="btn btn-secondary">About Me</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>




```
